# glitchtip_organization_member (Resource)

Invites and manages a member of a GlitchTip organization. Members are identified by the organization slug and the member id. The `email` and `organization` attributes cannot be changed in place; changing either forces a new member to be invited.

Note: per-team roles (`teamRoles` in the API) are not exposed in this version, because the API detail endpoint returns team membership as plain team slugs rather than roles and therefore cannot round-trip.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "glitchtip_organization_member" "example" {
  organization = glitchtip_organization.example.slug
  email        = "developer@example.com"
  org_role     = "member"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address of the invited member. Cannot be changed in place; changing it forces a new resource.
- `org_role` (String) Organization-level role of the member. One of `member`, `admin`, `manager`, or `owner`.
- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization the member belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `send_invite` (Boolean) Whether to send an invitation email when the member is created. This is a create-only behavior flag; it is never refreshed from the API. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the member was invited.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the organization member.
- `is_owner` (Boolean) Whether the member is an owner of the organization.
- `pending` (Boolean) Whether the member's invitation is still pending acceptance.
- `role_name` (String) Human-readable name of the member's organization role.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Organization members are imported as "<organization-slug>/<member-id>".
terraform import glitchtip_organization_member.example acme-inc/123
```
